name: Arjun Mehta
headline: AI/ML Engineer | LangChain & RAG Specialist | B.Tech AI/ML
about: Passionate AI/ML engineer with 1.5 years of hands-on experience building production-grade LLM applications. Specialized in RAG architectures, LangChain agent development, and vector database integrations. Active open-source contributor with a focus on making AI accessible and responsible.

experience.title: AI/ML Intern
experience.description: Developed RAG-based document Q&A system using LangChain and Pinecone. Built custom LLM agents for internal process automation. Implemented prompt engineering strategies reducing hallucination by 40%. Worked with GPT-4 and Claude APIs for multi-model evaluation.

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description: Research on transformer architectures for low-resource languages. Published paper on efficient fine-tuning of LLMs. Built evaluation benchmarks for Hindi NLP models using Hugging Face.

certifications: DeepLearning.AI - LangChain for LLM Application Development

projects.name: IntelliDoc - RAG Document Assistant
projects.description: Production RAG system processing 10K+ documents with LangChain, Pinecone, and GPT-4. Features hybrid search, citation tracking, and multi-format support.

projects.name: AgentFlow - Multi-Agent Task Orchestrator
projects.description: LangGraph-based multi-agent system for automated research and report generation. Implements plan-and-execute architecture with tool-calling.

projects.name: HindiBERT Fine-tuning Pipeline
projects.description: Custom fine-tuning pipeline for BERT models on Hindi NLP tasks. Achieved SOTA on Hindi sentiment classification benchmark.
